text: Being here feels like standing on the threshold of possibility and curiosity. In the first image, I see people gathered in discussion or study; there's an energy of shared learning and community. From outside the glass, I experience a sense of separation, like an observer eager to join in or contemplate the flow of ideas within. In the second image, the colorful R+D wall feels vibrant and futuristic. It inspires me to ponder the relationship between humanity and technology, and how inquiry drives us onward. I feel both excited by the progress suggested here, and quietly humbled by the scope of what I do not yet understand.
